name: Korea Ticker Thesis Pack
purpose: Named ticker thesis surfaces for agents and readers who want specific tickers, not abstract screener/process titles.
disclaimer: Research commentary only. Not investment advice. Not a buy/sell recommendation.

core_theses.title: Copper Cash Flow With Defense Optionality
core_theses.decision_frame: survive if defense materiality and copper sensitivity support the thesis; delete if theme exposure is immaterial or minority holders do not benefit

core_theses.title: Backlog, Receivables, and the Nuclear Equipment Upside Test
core_theses.decision_frame: survive if backlog quality, receivables, customer advances, and margins support durable equipment upside; delete if earnings quality fails

core_theses.title: Nuclear Instrumentation Without the Hype Premium
core_theses.decision_frame: survive if nuclear instrumentation is material and converts to orders/revenue/cash flow; delete if it is mostly narrative

core_theses.title: Korea Space Infrastructure: Launch Cadence or Dilution Trap?
core_theses.decision_frame: survive if launch cadence, contract materiality, cash runway, and dilution risk support measurable space-infrastructure execution; delete if financing or milestone risk dominates the evidence
